title: rubus × molestus
intro: Rubus × molestus is a hybrid of the raspberry plant, known for its edible fruit and medicinal properties. It is valued for its high antioxidant content, which has been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in the treatment of various health conditions. The health benefits of Rubus × molestus include its ability to improve cardiovascular health, reduce blood pressure, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Rubus × molestus can be made into teas, tinctures, and jams, which can be consumed fresh or dried to harness its medicinal properties.
